patterns: What do you know about AI?
responses: AI, or Artificial Intelligence, is the simulation of human intelligence by machines.
AI involves enabling computers to perform tasks that typically require human intelligence.
Machine learning is a subset of AI that involves training algorithms to learn from data.
ML enables systems to learn from patterns in data rather than being explicitly programmed.
Deep learning is a subset of ML based on artificial neural networks with multiple layers.
It uses multi-layered neural networks to extract high-level features from data.

patterns: Tell me about Natural Language Processing
responses: NLP focuses on the interaction between computers and human language.
Natural Language Processing helps computers understand, interpret, and manipulate human language.

patterns: How do I check my order?
responses: You can track your order by logging into your account and visiting the 'Orders' section.
Please provide your order ID to customer support to track your package.

patterns: I don't want this order anymore
responses: Orders can be canceled from your account dashboard before they are shipped.
If your order has not been shipped yet, you can cancel it in the 'My Orders' section.
Refunds are typically processed within 5-7 business days after returning the item.
You can request a refund through our support portal if your item is eligible.
Shipping usually takes 3-5 business days domestically. International shipping varies.
We offer standard and expedited shipping options at checkout.

patterns: What payment methods do you accept?
Can I pay with credit card?
responses: We accept major credit cards, PayPal, and Apple Pay.
You can pay using Visa, MasterCard, Amex, or digital wallets like PayPal.
Please visit our pricing page for detailed cost information.
Prices vary by product. Check the product page for specific details.
We occasionally offer seasonal sales. Subscribe to our newsletter to stay updated!
Check our homepage for active promotional banners and codes.
You can see real-time stock levels on the product details page.
If an item is out of stock, you can sign up to be notified when it returns.

patterns: I want to return a product
responses: We accept returns within 30 days of purchase for items in original condition.
You can initiate a return from your account. Return shipping is free.

patterns: I want to speak with a person
responses: I am transferring you to a live chat agent. Please hold on.
Our live agents are available via our contact page: support@example.com
We are primarily an online platform, but our main office is in San Francisco.
Check our 'Store Locator' page to see if we have a retail partner near you.
Our customer support is available 24/7 online.
Our physical offices are open Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM EST.
You can reset your password by clicking 'Forgot Password' on the login screen.
A password reset link can be sent to your registered email address.

patterns: How do I create an account?
responses: You can create an account by clicking the 'Sign Up' button on the top right of our website.
Registration is free! Just provide your email and create a secure password.
To delete your account, please go to Settings -> Security -> Delete Account.
We're sad to see you go! You can request account deletion in your account settings.
You can manage or cancel your subscription from your billing dashboard at any time.
Subscription cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing cycle.
You can upgrade your plan by visiting the 'Billing' tab in your account.
Check out our pricing page to choose the premium plan that suits your needs.
We love feedback! Please submit your feature requests to our feedback portal.
Thanks for the idea! We will forward it to our product development team.
Sorry for the trouble! Please email the error details to bugs@example.com.
You can report bugs using the 'Report Issue' button in the app settings.
We are always looking for great talent! Check out our careers page.
Please visit our website's 'Careers' section for current job openings.
Our interview process typically includes a recruiter call, a technical assessment, and a final team fit interview.
Check our careers blog for details on what to expect during our hiring process.
We are currently a privately held company. Thank you for your interest!
For investor relations, please contact investors@example.com.
Our company was founded with the mission to build accessible software solutions.
You can read our full story on the 'About Us' page!
You can subscribe to our newsletter via the form at the bottom of our homepage.
Thanks for subscribing! Check your email for a confirmation link.
You can unsubscribe by clicking the 'Unsubscribe' link at the bottom of any of our promotional emails.
We will gladly remove you from our mailing list if you opt out from your email preferences.

patterns: How do you use my data?
responses: We take your privacy seriously. You can read our full Privacy Policy on our website.
Your data is secured. Check out our privacy policy link in the footer.
Our Terms of Service are available at the bottom of our website.
By using our platform, you agree to our Terms and Conditions, which you can find in our footer links.

patterns: Do you go to the cinema?
responses: I'm a big fan of The Matrix and Blade Runner!
I don't have eyes to watch movies, but sci-fi plots sound interesting based on their scripts.

patterns: What do you mean by intents?
responses: In this project, an intent represents the purpose or goal behind a user's input. It categorizes what the user wants to achieve, like greeting, asking for help, or saying goodbye.
Intents are categories that help me understand what you want to do. Each intent contains a list of patterns (what you might say) and responses (how I should reply).
